jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Shyaway
jsonLd.description:
Shyaway invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shyaway:
Shyaway is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway!
